overview: I built 7 tools across 3 domains and 4 agents this week, from a calculator to an autonomous research agent. I learned that tool descriptions are prompt engineering, autonomy costs 2-3x API calls, and 80% of production code is resilience, not features.

keyPoints.title: Tool descriptions are mini-prompts, not documentation
Tool use costs 2-3x more API calls than conversation
Research agent hallucinated URLs, got 4 of 20 fetches
80% of production code is resilience, 20% is functionality
Claude chains tools autonomously — no workflow logic written
